name: Pumpkin Praline Pie
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2 In a large bowl, blend pumpkin, condensed milk, eggs, spices, and salt; pour into pastry shell.
3 Bake 50 to 55 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
4 Arrange pecans in a circle on top of the pie.
5 In a small saucepan, combine remaining ingredients; cook and stir until sugar dissolves. Simmer 5 minutes; remove from heat.
6 Cool for 5 minutes; spoon over the pecans.
7 Refrigerate leftover pie. Makes one 9-inch pie.
